overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort Bitcoin ETF (SBIT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg Bitcoin index. The fund tracks -2x the daily price movements of an index that measures the price of Bitcoin. The fund uses swaps to provide inverse exposure to Bitcoin. SBIT was launched on Apr 2, 2024 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares Launches First ETF to Target 2x Daily Bitcoin Returns
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares is launching BITU, the first ETF to target 2x daily bitcoin returns, and SBIT, the first ETF to target -2x daily bitcoin returns.
